note: Candidates are ready for automatic curation-agent audit; high-confidence records may be promoted by scripts/agent_audit.py.
audit_note: High-confidence records are promoted automatically. Main scope covers acoustic imaging/fusion; the mmWave track covers radar imaging, FMCW/MIMO-SAR, 4D radar, and radar point clouds.
mmwave_track_policy: Only final-venue papers from the explicit top-venue allow-list are allowed in data/mmwave_papers.json; arXiv-only records are excluded.
